title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, 25-year-old co-founders of Corgi, raised a $108M Series A by rebuilding the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy systems. They pursued the most ambitious version of their idea despite multiple near-failures and regulatory challenges, creating a defensible moat through deep domain expertise and time invested.
